{{Infobox artifact
| name = Void key
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Constructs can be stored using a [[void key]].}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]]'s [[void key]] can produce weapons and shields.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] intends to keep the [[Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] in his [[void key]].}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|But what about—" the King began, but a void key the size of a barn opened next to him.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
